RMA - Return Management: Enable or disable the RMA functionality.

RMA - Return Management: Number of days after order completion within which a return can be requested.

RMA - Return Management: If enabled, new RMA requests will be automatically approved.

RMA - Return Management: Email sent to the customer when the RMA status changes.
